entries.labour.rows[0].role: Technical director and evidence systems architect
entries.otherRows[0].description: Direct project compute, secure storage, open-source integration/test infrastructure, evidence corpus handling, validation materials, dissemination/reporting outputs and project documentation for the UK Aureon Evidence OS work package. The allowance is capped so the UK project cost model remains at GBP250,000 and does not include profit or unsupported proprietary licence purchases.

finance_entry_packet.paye_control: HMRC PAYE application receipt is evidenced, but no final employer PAYE reference is evidenced. Use the IFS option that states the listed people are not registered on the PAYE scheme unless a final HMRC employer reference is supplied before portal entry.

historical_baseline_values: FTE 1, innovation FTE 1, operating profit/loss GBP76000, innovation expenditure GBP25000, innovative turnover 100%, R&D projects 1 and training counts 0 are carried from prior IFS portal-progress evidence for this company.
Turnover GBP100497 and full-time employees 1 are already recorded in the Aureon finance profile from 2026 accounts/iXBRL evidence.
forecast_values: Expected additional FTE is 0 because no source-backed hiring commitment exists.
Expected additional turnover is 0 because no source-backed customer, partner exploitation or sales forecast exists for the UK-Switzerland route.
Expected new products/services/processes is 1 because the proposed work package produces one Aureon Evidence OS assurance workflow/process.
Commercial readiness is set low at 2 because market and partner validation remain incomplete.
Technology readiness is set at 4 because the repo/local prototype and workflow evidence support lab/local validation, not operational consortium deployment.

known_provider_issue.handling: If the provider review page still returns blank values after entry, do not press final Project Impact Submit; record the provider persistence block and continue with IFS finance readback or support escalation.

sources.name: IFS UK-Switzerland open-source cost model
sources.used_for: Finance project-cost entries and grant request totals.

sources.name: IFS UK-Switzerland portal progress artifact
sources.used_for: Baseline Project Impact values previously saved or staged for this company.

sources.name: Innovate UK Project Impact guidance
sources.used_for: Purpose of Project Impact data collection.

sources.name: Project Impact questions coverage
sources.used_for: Confirm that Project Impact asks for organisation and innovation contribution data.

sources.name: UKRI technology readiness levels
sources.used_for: Technology readiness uses a 1 to 9 maturity scale.

remaining_gates: Exact action-time approval for saving the listed finance and Project Impact values into the live IFS/Salesforce provider pages.
Project Impact provider persistence must be verified after entry before pressing final survey Submit.
Swiss implementation partner and research institute or valid waiver evidence remain required before final submission.
Partner budget and country-balance evidence remain required before final submission.
Award terms acceptance and final submit remain separate legal actions.

controls: This packet prepares exact portal-entry values; it does not submit or transmit them.
Forecast fields are conservative where partner, customer, hiring and turnover evidence is missing.
PAYE is not represented as finally registered because only the HMRC application receipt is evidenced.
Award terms and final IFS submit remain separate legal actions after readback verifies finance and Project Impact.
No plaintext credentials, bank data, raw tax files, private keys or tokens are included.
